name: Feature request
about: Propose a new mode, phase, hook, or integration
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## Problem
<!-- Which LLM bias or operational pain does this address? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- New mode? New phase? Extension of an existing one? -->

## Category

- [ ] New mode
- [ ] New phase
- [ ] New hook / gate
- [ ] New profile
- [ ] New integration (bridge)
- [ ] Dashboard enhancement
- [ ] Tooling / DX
- [ ] Documentation

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- How will we know this is done? -->
- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What else did you think about? Why reject? -->

## Additional context
<!-- Mockups, links, references (e.g., ACC Core Skills modules) -->
